title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: OOB write in bigint::ProcessorImpl::FromStringLarge
bounty_rationale: report of V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
When converting a string of a particular size into a `BigInt`, a heap OOB write can be triggered by changing the length of the result `BigInt` during processing.

The following code is initially executed when converting a string to a `BigInt` ([link](https://source.chromiu
